reasoning: The question asks whether 2025 will be the hottest year on record, based on NASA's GISTEMP index. It is currently April 2026, so the data for 2025 has already been published. Multiple authoritative sources, including WMO, NASA, Carbon Brief, and NOAA, have reported on the 2025 global temperatures. They universally agree that 2024 remains the hottest year on record. NASA GISTEMP specifically ranked 2025 as the second warmest year on record, behind 2024. As an anomaly greater than any previously recorded year is necessary for a "Yes" resolution, and the data clearly shows 2025 was lower than 2024, the resolution is firmly "No". I assign a 2% probability to account for any extremely unlikely edge cases, revisions, or technicalities.
